personal.name: Rahul Mahto
personal.description: Full-stack developer & ML researcher at Tata Consultancy Services. Published in Springer. 500+ DSA problems solved. Building scalable backends and exploring federated learning & cybersecurity.

about: I'm Rahul Mahto, a software developer based in Kolkata, India. I graduated from IIIT Allahabad with a B.Tech in Information Technology (CGPA: 8.00) and currently work as an Assistant System Engineer at TCS.

I specialize in backend development, REST APIs, and machine learning. My research on Federated Learning for Pneumonia Diagnosis was published in a Springer conference, achieving 91% model accuracy while preserving full data privacy.
I've also interned as an Ethical Hacker at CDAC Noida and worked as an Advanced Math Expert at Chegg India, reflecting my passion for security, rigorous reasoning, and education.

projects.name: Diagnosis of Pneumonia Using Federated Learning
projects.description: Designed a distributed FL system across multiple client nodes for privacy-preserving training. Implemented data preprocessing, model aggregation, and secure client–server communication. Achieved 91% model accuracy with fully decentralized data.

projects.name: Accountsy Bill — Invoice Management System
projects.description: Full-stack invoicing platform with authentication, billing workflows, and PDF generation. Built RESTful APIs and optimized backend for concurrent users. Enhanced admin reporting through dashboard improvements.

projects.name: Real-time Chat Application
projects.description: Full-featured real-time messaging app built on the MERN stack with Socket.io — featuring rooms, presence indicators, and instant message delivery at scale.

projects.name: Multi-Camera People Tracking System
projects.description: Computer vision system that tracks individuals across multiple camera feeds using re-identification algorithms to maintain consistent identity across camera transitions in real-time.

bullets: Working with JavaScript, Java, MySQL, RESTful APIs, and backend development following software engineering best practices.
Optimized SQL queries for analytics modules, improving response time and system performance.
Worked across full SDLC phases: requirement analysis, development, testing, and deployment.
Actively building expertise in scalable backends and high-performance systems.

experience.company: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC)
bullets: Conducted vulnerability assessments and penetration testing on applications and networks.
Documented security gaps and mitigation strategies to improve system reliability and resilience.
Solved advanced mathematics problems covering algebra, calculus, discrete math, and statistics for students globally.
Delivered detailed step-by-step explanations to build conceptual understanding in learners.
Maintained high accuracy and quality standards consistently across hundreds of solutions.
